name: Autophagy Induction registry refresh for June 15, 2026

scope.question: Do current ClinicalTrials.gov and PubMed checks for stale Autophagy Induction trial-watch records change the public outlook or only clear local registry metadata debt?

summary: Refreshed Autophagy Induction trial-watch metadata after the scoped audit found eleven registry-linked studies and four stale or missing registry checks. Current ClinicalTrials.gov checks found no newly posted registry results for SmartAge, the FMD autophagic-flux pilot, the FMD protein-content randomized study, high-purity spermidine, the spermidine vaccine-response pilot, KH-1, FMD immunosenescence, REVERSE rapamycin plus ProLon, spermidine elderly coronary artery disease, spermidine MCI sleep/autophagy, or trehalose T2D microvascular autophagy records. PubMed discovery for the June 11-15 delta window found no new treated-human aging/autophagy result, correction, or retraction that changes the public Autophagy Induction outlook. Close hits were review, mechanism, disease-context, animal/model, or wrong-scope items.

materiality_decision.rationale: The pass changed only local registry freshness metadata. The June 11 coverage repair already made active and no-results registry context visible publicly, no checked ClinicalTrials.gov record gained posted results, and the same-window PubMed hits did not add a new aging-relevant treated-human autophagy result or alter the current low-confidence human biomarker signal, mixed momentum, safety framing, or taxonomy boundaries.

search_log.summary: The scoped audit found eleven registry-linked studies, zero missing detail records, four stale or missing registry checks, and zero open stale watch items. The stale checks were SmartAge/NCT03094546, FMD autophagic flux/NCT06115551, FMD protein-content/NCT06560996, and high-purity spermidine/NCT05459961.

search_log.query: Known Autophagy Induction NCT records NCT03094546, NCT06115551, NCT06560996, NCT05459961, NCT05421546, NCT04928963, NCT06445569, NCT07354620, NCT06186102, NCT07383311, NCT05593549, and NCT07255300
search_log.summary: Direct registry checks found no newly posted ClinicalTrials.gov results. The four stale posted-result records remain represented by PubMed result sources while their ClinicalTrials.gov records have no results module. The no-results watchlist records remain unchanged: KH-1 completed/no-results, FMD immunosenescence unknown-status/no-results, REVERSE active/no-results, spermidine CAD active/no-results, spermidine MCI recruiting/no-results, trehalose recruiting/no-results, and the excluded FMD follow-up recruiting/no-results.

search_log.query: autophagy, autophagy induction, autophagic flux, spermidine, polyamine, trehalose, fasting mimicking diet, and fasting-mimicking diet terms with aging/older/elderly/longevity/healthspan/frailty/immunosenescence/senescence terms; publication and entry dates 2026-06-11 to 2026-06-15
search_log.summary: The PubMed screen returned no new treated-human aging/autophagy result. The closest records were DBI/ACBP autophagy-inhibitory stress-signal mechanism context, C. elegans UFMylation and stress-resilience context, a small FMD periodontal-treatment feasibility pilot, an ocular geroprotectors review, a tree-shrew UCMSC ovarian-aging study, and a niclosamide inflammaging review.

search_log.query: autophagy, autophagic flux, spermidine, polyamine, trehalose, fasting mimicking diet, and fasting-mimicking diet aging terms with Published Erratum, Retraction of Publication, Retracted Publication, or Expression of Concern publication types; publication and entry dates 2026-06-11 to 2026-06-15
search_log.summary: No same-window correction, retraction, or expression-of-concern records were found for the scoped Autophagy Induction aging terms.

search_log.query: autophagy aging older adult; spermidine aging older adult cognition autophagy; fasting mimicking diet aging autophagy frailty; trehalose autophagy aging; KH-1 autophagy; autophagic flux aging human trial
search_log.summary: Broad registry searches returned the already mapped KH-1, FMD immunosenescence, spermidine MCI, and trehalose registries plus adjacent or wrong-scope records such as a withdrawn fasting-induced autophagy study, sarcopenic-obesity observational work, exercise, urolithin A, metformin, and MILES records. No new result-bearing Autophagy Induction registry was found.

trial_watch_checks.summary: SmartAge remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results module, while the result-bearing JAMA Network Open publication is already in the evidence layer. No public change is needed.
The FMD autophagic-flux registry remains unknown-status with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section, while the GeroScience result publication is already represented.
The very-low-calorie diet registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results module; the Clinical Nutrition result publication is already represented.

The high-purity spermidine registry remains active-not-recruiting with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section despite an existing Nutrition Research result publication. The status mismatch is unchanged and does not alter the public outlook.
The spermidine vaccine-response pilot remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results module; PMID 42169618 is already in the public evidence layer.
The FMD immunosenescence registry remains unknown-status with no posted results. It remains boundary/watchlist context, not evidence progress.
KH-1 remains completed with no posted ClinicalTrials.gov results. The completed no-results boundary already exists in the public map.
REVERSE remains active-not-recruiting with no posted results. It stays combination-intervention boundary context rather than clean Autophagy Induction evidence.
The spermidine elderly coronary artery disease registry remains active-not-recruiting with no posted results. It remains a future watch item.
The spermidine MCI sleep/autophagy registry remains recruiting with no posted results. It remains future disease-context watchlist evidence.
The trehalose T2D microvascular autophagy registry remains recruiting with no posted results. It remains mechanistic disease-context watchlist evidence.

excluded_sources.title: A Fasting-Mimicking Diet Affects the Inflammatory Response Following Periodontal Treatment: A Multi-centre Feasibility Randomised Controlled Pilot Trial.
excluded_sources.reason: Human FMD feasibility pilot in periodontal treatment. It is disease/inflammation context without aging, autophagic-flux, frailty, or healthy-aging endpoints that would change the Autophagy Induction outlook.

excluded_sources.title: Cell stress and death liberate the autophagy-inhibitory tissue stress hormone DBI/ACBP into the circulation.
excluded_sources.reason: Mechanistic and cohort-biomarker context for autophagy-inhibitory stress signaling, aging, inflammation, and morbidity. It is not an intervention result for autophagy induction.

excluded_sources.title: Exploring the organismal role of UFMylation in development, stress resilience and neurological function in C. elegans.
excluded_sources.reason: C. elegans mechanism and stress-resilience context involving autophagy induction, not a treated-human aging result.

excluded_sources.title: Integrated single cell and spatial transcriptomics reveals the cellular and molecular mechanisms underlying UCMSCs treatment of ovarian aging in tree shrews.
excluded_sources.reason: Stem-cell therapy in an ovarian-aging animal model with autophagy-related mechanism context. The intervention and track fit extracellular/stem-cell therapy more than Autophagy Induction.

excluded_sources.title: Geroprotective Agents, Including Glucagon-Like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists, for Ocular Health.
excluded_sources.reason: Ocular-health review spanning multiple geroprotectors; it does not add a primary autophagy-induction aging result.

excluded_sources.title: Repurposing niclosamide to mitigate inflammaging: a review of multi-target mechanisms in cellular senescence and age-related decline.
excluded_sources.reason: Niclosamide review with autophagy and AMPK pathway context. It is not scoped to the current spermidine, FMD, trehalose, or direct Autophagy Induction public support map.

excluded_sources.title: Follow up Study of Varapodio Trial: Effect of Longevity and Fasting Mimicking Diet on Risk Factors Age Correlated and Biomarkers of Aging
excluded_sources.reason: Recruiting no-results FMD follow-up focused on body fat and risk-factor maintenance. It remains adjacent FMD surveillance context rather than a current Autophagy Induction delta.

excluded_sources.title: Time Course for Fasting-induced Autophagy in Humans
excluded_sources.reason: Withdrawn fasting-induced autophagy registry with zero actual enrollment and no results. It does not affect the current public read.

excluded_sources.title: Dissecting the Molecular and Cellular Pathophysiology of Sarcopenic Obesity in the Elderly
excluded_sources.reason: Large observational sarcopenic-obesity registry returned by broad autophagy/aging terms, but not an autophagy-inducing intervention result.

notes: No public outlook, finding, source, or activity record was staged because the live checks did not change the evidence interpretation.
ClinicalTrials.gov still lacks results modules for the stale posted-result records; local result status remains posted because result publications are already in the public evidence layer.

Month-only ClinicalTrials.gov completion dates remain represented only where prior local metadata had already normalized them; this pass did not add new artificial day-level dates from month-only registry fields.
next_actions: Continue ordinary surveillance for KH-1 posted results, FMD immunosenescence status/results, REVERSE trial results, spermidine CAD results, spermidine MCI sleep/autophagy results, and trehalose autophagic-flux results.
Keep the public Autophagy Induction outlook unchanged unless a future posted result pairs credible autophagy target engagement with meaningful aging-relevant outcomes.
